response.justification: Strong 20-year software engineering track record with diverse technical expertise and recent exposure to AI infrastructure, but lacks the specialized AI domain expertise and demonstrated strategic leadership experience critical for this Principal Engineer role. The job requires proven expertise in building AI products/platforms and advising on AI adoption; the resume shows software craftsmanship skills but no evidence of recognized AI innovation or strategic AI leadership.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across full-stack, infrastructure, and embedded systems, meeting the 15+ year requirement
Recent hands-on experience with AI infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq, showing emerging AI domain exposure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial mindset as founder of GISCollective platform and ability to innovate and build technical vision from scratch
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML domain expertise or proven track record building AI products or platforms—a core requirement for this AI Strategy role
Career progression shows solid individual contributor and senior engineer roles, but no clear Director-level strategic or people leadership experience needed for this IC principal role
Recent AI involvement is infrastructure-focused (code generators, frameworks) rather than strategic AI innovation, customer advisory, or large-scale AI platform adoption
